{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD subgraph ThreeAxes["Three-Axis Architecture"] ColorTheme["Color Theme
───────────
pict-section-theme catalog

• bg, text, border
• brand, status
• data palette
• cross-app reusable

--theme-color-* (CSS vars)"] Renderer["Renderer
────────
YOUR MODULE (registry)

• node body shape
• jitter / shadow
• font family
• CSS overrides

--your-module-* CSS
(geometry / typography)"] EdgeTheme["Edge Theme
──────────
YOUR MODULE (registry)

• path gen
• routing
• arrowheads
(optional)

function members"] end ThreeAxes --> StylePreset["Style Preset
────────────
YOUR MODULE (curated bundles)

Each preset names one entry from each axis.
Users pick a preset → all three axes get applied at once.
Apps can register custom presets.
Power users override per-axis post-preset."] ","style":"notebook"}
